Title: Geometric Abstract Print - Mid-Century Modern Wall Art
Description:
Elevate your space with this striking geometric abstract print. Featuring a pattern of interlocking triangles and arcs in rich jewel tones—mustard yellow, burnt orange, deep teal, and mustard—this art piece evokes the sophisticated charm of mid-century modern design.

This composition is clean, dynamic, and instantly adds a focal point to any room, making it perfect for living rooms, home offices, or modern bedrooms.

  • Modern Aesthetics: The bold, simple shapes and geometric structure make it a versatile piece that complements various decor styles.
  • Vibrant Color Palette: The harmonious mix of warm and cool tones provides visual depth and energy.
  • Perfect Gift: It makes an excellent gift for housewarmings, apartment decor, or for anyone who appreciates abstract or mid-century design.

Whether printed on canvas or framed, this artwork adds sophisticated character and a pop of color to your interior design scheme.
